title: test: fix prune logic for cache-from after adding content summary
body:
Don't use `run_buildah rmi --all -f` since on podman-remote test this will remove prefetched alpine and it will try to pull alpine from docker.io with completely different digest (ruining our cache logic) need for this test.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4326#issuecomment-1291707569
